creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
Created attachment 241678
Update patch

The new version of BIRD was released this afternoon. I have upgraded and it seems to run fine, poudriere testport passes and both flavors build fine on stable/13.  Heads up: the versioning scheme changed from <epoch>.<major>.<minor> to <major>.<minor>.<patch>.
